tuning: E A D G B E
content:
“You Gotta Be” by Des’Ree

[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


Verse 1:
[tab][ch]F(add2)[/ch]
Listen as your day unfolds[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Challenge what the future holds[/tab]
[tab][ch]F(add2)[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Try and keep your head up to the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]F(add2)[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Go ahead release your fears[/tab]
[tab][ch]F(add2)[/ch]
Stand up and be counted[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Don't be ashamed to cry[/tab]


Chorus 1:
[tab][ch]F(add2)[/ch]
You gotta be[/tab]
[tab][ch]F(add2)[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
You gotta be wiser, you gotta be hard[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
You gotta be tough, you gotta be stronger[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
You gotta be cool, you gotta be calm[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
You gotta stay together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]C/F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
All I know, all I know, love will save the day[/tab]
